package rulefixtures

import (
	"encoding/hex"
)

// scenario for fmt_sprintf_hex_to_string: `fmt.Sprintf("%x", ...)` instead of a direct hex formatter when only the string is needed.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario494Positive(values [][]byte) []string {
	out := make([]string, 0, len(values))
	for _, value := range values {
		out = append(out, hex.EncodeToString(value))
	}
	return out
}
